description: The birth of a person, modelled as its own event Subject. Maps to CIDOC CRM E67 Birth (http://www.cidoc-crm.org/cidoc-crm/E67_Birth).

Brought into life.description: The person born. CIDOC P98 brought into life (inverse P98i was born).

By mother.description: The mother. CIDOC P96 by mother.

From father.description: The father. CIDOC P97 from father.

Took place at.description: Where the birth happened. CIDOC P7 took place at.

Date.description: When the birth happened. CIDOC P4 has time-span (E52 Time-Span); the date is the time-span's value, collapsed here to a single date.
